scripts.check: cargo check && cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy -- -W clippy::pedantic -W clippy::nursery -D warnings && cargo build && bun lint && bun run build
scripts.lint: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy -- -W clippy::pedantic -W clippy::nursery -D warnings
scripts.build: bun run css && trunk build --release --no-default-features --features hydrate && cargo run --no-default-features --features ssr --bin prerender -- dist/index.html
